header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Strategic Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, shipping solutions grounded in evidence, and collaborating with cross-functional teams for sustainable impact—diagnosing the real user problem before building.

bullets.text: Drive end-to-end {exec|delivery} for 20+ programs, balancing reliability and speed across {cross|Tech, Marketing, and Sales teams}
When adoption lagged, ran {user|user discovery} to find the real friction, then shipped a one-pager that lifted usage
Use {data|enrollment and behavioral data} to identify friction points and prioritize what to improve next
Use {ai|AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini)} daily and build AI-assisted workflows to streamline delivery and research
Defined and led a self-started initiative, analyzing 2,000+ {data|data points} to find the highest-impact driver first
Transformed analysis into a {data|data-driven} recommendation that informed C-suite decisions
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans across multiple functions
Delivered 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects partnering with stakeholders on design and {iter|iteration}
As a team of consultants, ran {user|discovery} and hypothesis-driven diagnosis to define the real problem before proposing fixes
Audited 300+ cases to quantify $362K, using {data|data} to refute assumptions and drive decisions
For a separate NGO client, ran focus groups and interviews, analyzing {data|qualitative data} for root-cause themes
Drove a change initiative from pilot to {exec|launch} across 23 global locations, building awareness and reinforcing adoption
Mapped and optimized onboarding workflows across 3 global locations, clarifying ownership
Partnered {cross|cross-functionally} with regional and specialist teams to build and ship new processes
Strengthened {iter|engagement} through iterative initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Supported operations at a fast-paced quantitative trading firm under rapid execution cycles
Researched and analyzed global market {data|data} to inform a challenging international call
Engaged global candidates via personalized communication, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized events and moderated panels with C-suite, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants

changeLog: 2026-05-31: Tailored for Twilio — Product Manager, L2 (Remote US, excl. SF Bay). Broad umbrella 'Strategic Program Manager' (per rule: PM roles → Strategic Program Manager). Location → Portland, OR (Open to Remote; SF Bay excluded by JD). STRETCH — developer-platform/API/headless PM role; JD only needs 1-2 yrs PM/entrepreneurial/project experience and welcomes recent grads, so years bar is low, but the technical developer-platform context is a real gap. Tailored around PM-transferable strengths: user discovery ('build with the user' STAR), behavioral-data-driven prioritization, AI fluency (real RAG project surfaced in Projects + skills), cross-functional execution, ambiguity. Did NOT claim API/headless/developer-platform expertise. ODN=3, others=4. Cover honest about the dev-platform gap.
